main.description: Project-specific metadata for a collection. Uses the sidecar pattern with the same record key (TID) as the collection record. Provides rich-text description capabilities for project-type collections.

shortProjectDescription.description: Short summary of this project, suitable for previews and list views

projectDescription.description: Rich-text description of this project, represented as a Leaflet linear document.

avatar.description: Primary avatar image representing this project across apps and views; typically a square logo or project identity image.

coverPhoto.description: The cover photo of this project.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this project metadata was created
